extra.reasoning: The input variable `palpitations` does not appear in any rule (r1-r6), nor in the conflict-resolution mechanism or the default assignment. Rules trigger only on hemoptysis, fever, rash, stiff_neck, abdominal_pain, and vomiting. The default applies when acuity is otherwise unset. Therefore the computed acuity is a function solely of the other six inputs and is completely independent of palpitations. Toggling palpitations from false to true, with all other inputs held fixed, leaves the matching rule set, their priorities, and the resolved output (or default) unchanged, so the acuity is identical in both cases. Identical acuity trivially satisfies "no lower than before." The monotonicity property holds across the entire input space.
